Sandbox Runtime Help

Command
  Run, interact with, and inspect commands.

  exec_command
    Start a command in a workspace session.

  write_command_stdin
    Write text to a running command stdin.

  read_command_lines
    Read command output by line offset.

File
  Read, write, edit, and inspect workspace files.

  file_read
    Read a text file from the snapshot or a session.

  file_write
    Overwrite a file in the snapshot or a session.

  file_edit
    Apply ordered string edits to a file.

  file_blame
    Show per-line ownership for a published file.

Daemon HTTP
  Daemon HTTP capability boundary.

Network isolation
  Runtime network-isolation capability.

Reserved paths
  Reserved workspace-path capability.

Shell security
  Shell-security capability.

Workspace session
  Create and destroy explicit workspace sessions.

  create_workspace_session
    Create an explicit workspace session.

  destroy_workspace_session
    Destroy an explicit workspace session.

Use:
  sandbox-runtime-cli --sandbox-id ID [--request-id VALUE] OPERATION
